raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2025 Citibank notified me of a suspicious purchase attempt on a card that was otherwise dormant for more than 2 years. They properly declined that transaction. I immediately notified them this is fraudulent transaction, and they issued a replacement card, but authorized two additional charges on the same day, one in the same establishment, and both in the same vicinity. 

I immediately tried to place a dispute notice on both transactions, finally successful on 4th attempt with one transaction, and a month later on the XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, when no action or notification was received from Citibank, I delivered via tracked Priority Mail, a letter detailing my grievance. In return, Citibank imposed a late fee and interest charges on the card, and threatened with reporting delinquency on an otherwise pristine credit report. 
Timeline : 1. XX/XX/2025 : Received fraud alert from Citibank on a declined charge on card XXXX ( later replaced by card XXXX.. 
2. Same day : Confirmed with Citibank that the charge was fraudulent. 
3.Citibank later approved two additional charges : {$1300.00} ( car rental ) and {$80.00} ( gas ). 
4. The car rental was made in someone elses name, requiring a drivers licenseclear evidence of identity theft.

5.Both charges were reported and disputed immediately.

6.The {$1300.00} charge was only eventually marked as disputed after multiple calls ; the {$80.00} charge was never addressed despite multiple promises to do so.

7. Citibank failed to properly investigate or respond to the fraud. 
XXXX. XX/XX/2025 : delivered a formal dispute letter via Priority Mail with trackingno response received as of now.
